items.title: Didero lands $30M to put manufacturing procurement on ‘agentic’ autopilot
items.description: Didero functions as an agentic AI layer that sits on top of a company’s existing ERP, acting as a coordinator that reads incoming communications and a...

items.title: Anthropic raises another $30B in Series G, with a new value of $380B
items.description: The infusion of funding for the AI startup takes place as it is vying for customers and cultural attention with its competitor, OpenAI.

items.title: YouTube finally launches a dedicated app for Apple Vision Pro
items.description: When Apple Vision Pro first came out two years ago, YouTube hesitated to release a dedicated app. Today is the day they officially launch one.

items.title: Hacker linked to Epstein removed from Black Hat cyber conference website

items.title: Trump administration undermines EPA enforcement of Clean Air Act
items.description: The EPA's new rule seeks to undo a 2009 finding that allowed the federal government to regulate six greenhouse gases.
